name: Basement Laboratory
hints: The basement laboratory has a mixing vat and a staircase back up. This is where you make jet fuel.
LOOK VAT and LOOK STAIRCASE. You need a flashlight on to see properly. The vat is for mixing fuel.
MAKE FUEL requires: flashlight (on), quartz, jar of glowing fluid, and jug of gasoline - all must be accessible. LOOK STAIRCASE with flashlight on finds a hidden item. GO STAIRCASE returns to office.
Bring all fuel ingredients here: quartz, glowing fluid jar, gasoline jug, and have the flashlight on. Then MAKE FUEL. LOOK STAIRCASE with light to find something hidden under the stairs.

effects: Message: under stairs, I get it.

notes: Basement laboratory below the Yoyodyne office. Key location for making jet fuel. MAKE FUEL needs flashlight on + quartz + glowing fluid + gasoline. Without a formula it says 'No formula!' Without all ingredients it says 'something is missing.' LOOK STAIRCASE with light finds a hidden item. GO STAIRCASE returns to office (room 1).
